ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "reference_no" INTEGER /* Reference number for the course */,
  "teaching_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teaching staff leading the course */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., S, BS) */,
  "participant_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of academic credits awarded for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course was last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the course is taught */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_teaching_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("teaching_staff_id") REFERENCES teaching_staff ("teaching_staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teaching_staff" (
  "teaching_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching staff */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the teaching staff */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teaching staff */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teaching staff belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the teaching staff */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the teaching staff */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the teaching staff */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the teaching staff */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the teaching staff record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the teaching staff record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teaching_staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course date */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the course session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course session (e.g., V2-213, ONLINE) */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is online */,
  "zoom_link" TEXT /* Zoom link for online sessions */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants for the session */,
  "current_participants" INTEGER /* Current number of participants in the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course date was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the course date was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_dates_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "matriculation_number" TEXT /* Unique matriculation number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Waitlist status (e.g., active, removed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the waitlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the waitlist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message contained in the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Notification status (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ekvv" (
  "ekvv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eKVV entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "participant_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the eKVV entry (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the eKVV entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the eKVV entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ekvv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ekvv_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., popularity, engagement, workload) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reports_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
